notes: Starts in windowed mode 720p and crashes when quitting as others have said. Steam Input Per-Game Setting had to be "Forced Off" for the 360 controller to work. Everything else works fine, I had no need to use Wine D3D11 over DXVK, constant 60fps at 1440p, no stuttering.
title: Katamari Damacy REROLL

notes: Game runs mostly normally. After adjusting some settings, my gamepad was no longer registering properly, and I needed to restart the game to make things work again. Additionally, the game does not exit properly, and hangs on the end screen. You will need to kill the process manually.
title: Katamari Damacy REROLL

cpu: AMD A8-6500 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: This worked generally great right out of the box for me - no D3D11 tweaks required.  xpad w/ 360 controller worked right out of the box as well.  As everyone else mentions, starts windowed and gives you the option to change resolution/fullscreen once you get through tutorial, and crashes on exit.  I also have a thing where it tends to suddenly gets unplayably slow after starting a *second* level -- the first one I start has always run perfectly well.  (This can also be triggered, seemingly, by hitting the action button while in the "populating the earth with things" line on level load.)  So I've settled into a one level, quit, restart loop, which is fine for me.
title: Katamari Damacy REROLL

cpu: AMD Ryzen 7 2700U with Radeon Vega Mobile Gfx
notes: with proton 4.2-3 it just works out of the box and dose not need to be killed when you quit out of the game performance on my laptop is not wonderful at 1080p so I run it at 900p and it keeps the frame rate close enough to 60.
title: Katamari Damacy REROLL

notes: As noted elsewhere: requires D3D11, and you must make it through the tutorial with the keyboard before being able to change to fullscreen + control settings. That that, seems fine!
title: Katamari Damacy REROLL

notes: Didn't work at first, but forcing the use of Proton 4.2-4 and setting Launch Options to "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%" got it working flawlessly.
title: Katamari Damacy REROLL

notes: ran without any tweaks 1st attempt, with Logitech F710 gamepad working as well (game thinks it's an Xbox controller) and after tutorial could set resolution to 2560x1440 fullscreen no problem. no support for ultrawide or higher aspect ratios so you'll get black bars on the sides, thankfully no stretching.
title: Katamari Damacy REROLL

notes: Ran like a charm right out of the box, install and hit play. Tried it with both Steam controller and Logitech F710.
